---
title: "<i>Atalanta</i>"
---

## <i>Atalanta</i>

**Type:** periodical

### About

This was a magazine for girls (1887-1896), edited until 1893 by L. T. Meade, which CMY considered populist and trivial in comparison with the <i>Monthly Packet.</i>  She contributed  to it ‘John Keble’ <i>Atalanta </i>(May 1888) 466-71.  A conciliatory letter from Meade to CMY (MS Mrs Clare Roels, 4 September 1889) is evidently a reply to one in which CMY had complained of the ‘want of definite religion’ in the magazine.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
